plugins.name: ai-architect-core
plugins.description: AI-powered requirements engineering and system modeling plugin for Claude — create requirements catalogs, entity models, use case diagrams, and use case specifications through guided slash commands.

plugins.name: ai-architect-testing
plugins.description: AI-powered testing plugin for Claude — document a project-level testing concept and create Playwright E2E tests, Vitest unit tests, and structured manual test plans through guided slash commands.

plugins.name: ai-architect-dev-tools
plugins.description: Developer workflow tools for Claude — create conventional commits, project implementation guidelines, and structured use case implementation plans through guided slash commands.
